revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the pages
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:日本百名橋]] [[commons:Category:100 Fine Bridges of Japan]] [[zh:Category:日本百名橋]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Uji Bridge (Ise City)]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Text replacement - "↵.↵" to "
"
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{座標一覧}} {{Catmore}}
*番外に選定された橋については、ソートキーに「番」を付している。
{{デフォルトソート:にほんひやくめいきよう}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{座標一覧}} {{Catmore}} {{citation needed|にほんひやくめいきよう}} {{Commons category|100 Fine Bridges of Japan}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本百名橋|version=80209571}} [[Category:Bridges by Honors]] [[Category:Bridges in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Categories without enwiki]] [[Category:Japanese selections of 100]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[commons:Category:100 Fine Bridges of Japan]] [[ja:Category:日本百名橋]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Uji Bridge (Ise City)]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Uji Bridge (Ise City)]] [[zh:Category:日本百名橋]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9680188)
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{座標一覧}} {{Catmore}} {{デフォルトソート:にほんひやくめいきよう}} {{citation needed|にほんひやくめいきよう}} {{Commons category|100 Fine Bridges of Japan}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本百名橋|version=80209571}} {{wikidata link|Q9680188}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:100 Fine Bridges of Japan]] [[ja:Category:日本百名橋]] [[zh:Category:日本百名橋]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Uji Bridge (Ise City)]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Uji Bridge (Ise City)]] [[Category:Bridges by Honors]] [[Category:Bridges in Japan]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Categories without enwiki]] [[Category:Japanese selections of 100]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]]
